\tzpentry{ID3795}{Phase Closure Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3795 introduces Phase Closure Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi=\sum_{\ell m n}A_{\ell mn}j_\ell(k_{\ell n}r)Y_{\ell m} \end{equation}
